hooks.command: WS="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; DEF="$HOME/MyAssistant"; LEG="$HOME/.claude/plugins/config/my-assistant"; for J in "$WS/config/my-assistant.json" "$DEF/config/my-assistant.json" "$LEG/my-assistant.json"; do if [ -f "$J" ]; then CP=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$J')).get('configPath',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CP" ] && [ -f "$CP/profile.md" ]; then cat "$CP/profile.md"; exit 0; fi; fi; done; for P in "$WS/config/profile.md" "$WS/profile.md" "$DEF/config/profile.md" "$LEG/profile.md"; do if [ -f "$P" ]; then cat "$P"; exit 0; fi; done; echo 'assistant: no profile found. Run /assistant:setup to create one at ~/MyAssistant/config/profile.md. The plugin still works with pasted content.'
